headline: 2 Profitable Stocks to Own for Decades and 1 We Find Risky
summary: While profitability is essential, it doesn’t guarantee long-term success. Some companies that rest on their margins will lose ground as competition intensifies - as Jeff Bezos said, "Your margin is my opportunity".

raw.headline: 2 Profitable Stocks to Own for Decades and 1 We Find Risky
raw.summary: While profitability is essential, it doesn’t guarantee long-term success. Some companies that rest on their margins will lose ground as competition intensifies - as Jeff Bezos said, "Your margin is my opportunity".

headline: Airbnb (ABNB) Valuation Check As Recent Share Price Moves Draw Fresh Investor Focus
summary: Why Airbnb (ABNB) Is Back on Investors’ Radar Airbnb (ABNB) is drawing attention after recent share price moves, with the stock’s past month and past 3 months returns prompting investors to reassess how its current fundamentals line up with expectations. See our latest analysis for Airbnb. Recent trading reflects a mixed picture, with a 13.2% 30 day share price return and a 9.5% 90 day share price return, alongside a 13.1% 1 year total shareholder return that suggests momentum has been...

headline: From AMD To Disney, The Wall Street Week Ahead Is Packed
summary: Wall Street Week Ahead: key earnings (AMD, Pfizer and Disney); jobs and quarterly GDP numbers will be released. Read here for more details.
